[textmode.js](../../../../../index.md) / [media](../../../index.md) / [TextmodeVideo](../../TextmodeVideo.md) / dispose

# Method: dispose()

```ts
dispose(): void;
```

Dispose the video source and release the backing media element.

## Returns

`void`
